state_pressure.basis: June 25 session overlay — split unresolved; 10Y first negative Z cross confirmed two sessions.

session_context: June 25 session overlay: neutral | stable; split unresolved; 10Y turned negative; medium confidence, fragile stability.

drafts.x:
Oil is cratering — and the other signals aren't confirming.
Only matters if equities or yields confirms — and it hasn't yet.

SPX 7,372. 10Y 4.37%. Oil $70.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,483 or below 7,261
• 10Y moves beyond 4.57% or below 4.17%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Softening
CONFIDENCE: Medium (48/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 25, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,372.07   z +0.51
  10Y Yield:      4.371%  z -0.44
  WTI Oil:        70.45   z -2.57

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,372 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.37% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $70 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence sits at 48/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,483 or below 7,261
• 10Y moves beyond 4.57% or below 4.17%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 25, 2026, three structural matches for today’s neutral stable read — 10Y first negative Z cross confirmed two sessions, SPX below gate, WTI non-driving. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.zscores: WTI first negative Z this cycle (Z -0.23)
analog_rows.outcome: Oil fully exited the regime read within one session — once a signal turns negative for the first time, it stops driving and the other two signals carry the full weight of the call

analog_rows.zscores: 10Y first negative cross this cycle · SPX +0.5σ · WTI -2.3σ
analog_rows.outcome: 10Y’s first negative cross preceded a 5-session equity pullback — rates led the move by roughly a week once the cross became a trend, not a single print

analog_rows.zscores: 10Y first negative cross this cycle · SPX +0.4σ · WTI -2.1σ
analog_rows.outcome: Confirmed false signal — 10Y’s negative cross reversed within 3 sessions and SPX never broke its gate, the cross faded without resolving the regime

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. 10Y’s first negative Z cross this stretch, now confirmed across two sessions, is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,483 and 4.57%. Historical context.
